summary: Completed testing of Teacher Name and Other Activity Notes features on TeacherHub Lesson Planner. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Create plan with teacher_name field
Backend: Create plan with 'Other' activity notes
Backend: Create plan without teacher_name (optional field)
Backend: Create plan with empty 'Other' activity notes
Frontend: Teacher Name input field appears on Lesson Planner form
Frontend: Teacher Name field saves correctly when creating a plan
Frontend: Teacher Name field loads correctly when editing an existing plan
Frontend: 'Other' activity checkbox shows text input when checked
Frontend: 'Other' activity notes save correctly when creating a plan
Frontend: 'Other' activity notes load correctly when editing an existing plan
Frontend: Login with email/password works correctly
Frontend: Navigation to Lesson Planner works
seed_data_creation: Test plans created with TEST_ prefix for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher Name and Other Activity Notes features are fully functional. Backend API supports teacher_name field in lesson plans. Frontend displays 'Maestro' input field and shows text input for 'Otro' activity when checked. Test credentials: test@school.edu / testpassword

teacher_name_field.backend_model: LessonPlanCreate and LessonPlanResponse include teacher_name field
teacher_name_field.frontend_ui: Input field with data-testid='teacher-name-input' and label 'Maestro'
teacher_name_field.save_functionality: Teacher name saves correctly to database
teacher_name_field.load_functionality: Teacher name loads correctly when editing existing plan

other_activity_notes.backend_model: PlanDayActivity includes notes field for all activity types
other_activity_notes.frontend_ui: Text input appears when 'Otro' checkbox is checked (data-testid='activity-other-notes-{dayIndex}')
other_activity_notes.save_functionality: Other activity notes save correctly with the plan
other_activity_notes.load_functionality: Other activity notes load correctly when editing existing plan
